MOTION FOR LEAVE TO AMEND COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-22-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF KATRINA IMBUIDO, JOSEPHINE DALISKY, SHARLYN ARES AND JOSEPH BAGARES' MOTION FOR LEAVE TO AMEND COMPLAINT.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiffs' unopposed motion for leave to file first amended complaint is granted.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)
